appStoreConnect.subtitle: One Thought. One Day. Forever.
appStoreConnect.promotionalText: Write one sentence a day. Seal it. Rediscover it. AI reflections, time capsules, and 1,400+ prompts — the mindfulness journal that fits any life.
appStoreConnect.whatsNew: First release of OnePrompt! Write one thought per day with guided prompts, send sealed entries to your future self with time capsule reveals, and unlock weekly AI insights with a philosopher guide. Free to start — go premium for AI reflections, photo journaling, mood tracking, and custom prompts.
appStoreConnect.description:
One thought a day. That's all it takes.

OnePrompt is the mindful journaling app that makes consistency effortless. Each day, you get a single prompt. You write one sentence. You send it sealed into the future.

When the time capsule opens, you see exactly who you were.

— WRITE LESS. REMEMBER MORE —
Instant journaling: one sentence, 150 characters. No pressure, no blank pages, no perfectionism.

— TIME CAPSULE REVEALS —
Seal your thoughts for tomorrow, next week, or next month. Watch them unlock like letters to yourself.

— 1,400+ DAILY PROMPTS —
7 categories (Gratitude, Growth, Relationships, Creativity, Mindfulness, Reflection, Self-Discovery), 200 prompts each. A different spark every day.

— STREAK TRACKING —
Build a journaling habit you'll actually keep. See your current and longest streaks at a glance.

— 9 COLOUR THEMES —
Classic Blue, Mint Calm, Lavender Focus, Sunset Warm, Mono Minimal, Midnight Blue, and more. Light and dark mode.

— PREMIUM: AI REFLECTIONS —
Weekly AI-powered insights from your entries. Choose a philosopher guide — Nietzsche, Marcus Aurelius, Plato, Schiller, or Camus — to challenge and inspire you.

— PREMIUM: PHOTO JOURNALING —
Switch to daily photo prompts. Capture a moment. Seal it. Reveal it.

— PREMIUM: MOOD TRACKING —
Log your mood with each entry and watch patterns emerge over time.

— PREMIUM: CUSTOM PROMPTS —
Write your own prompts and add them to the daily rotation.

inAppPurchases.description: AI weekly reflections, philosopher guides, photo journaling, mood tracking, custom prompts, fireplace background, background music, PDF export
All premium features at £1.67/month — best value

appStoreConnect.reviewNotes: OnePrompt is a personal journaling app. Users write one sentence per day with AI-generated prompts, and can seal entries as time capsules (revealed after a user-chosen delay). AI weekly reflections use OpenAI (GPT-4o/GPT-4o-mini) via a Supabase Edge Function on the user's own journal data — no third-party sharing. Photo journaling uses the device camera with explicit permission. Background music plays ambient tracks bundled in the app. RevenueCat handles subscription management for the premium tier. The app works fully offline; cloud sync is optional and requires sign-in.

dataCollected.description: Email address for account creation and password recovery
Journal entries and photos stored on-device and optionally synced to cloud
Usage events via PostHog linked to a pseudonymous user UUID via posthog.identify() — no email or name collected
Crash reports via Sentry for stability improvements — no PII

Journal entries sent to OpenAI via Supabase Edge Function for AI Reflection (premium feature, user-initiated only). OpenAI is a subprocessor; data is not retained for model training per OpenAI API policy.
